items.title: Morgan Stanley files amendments for ETH and SOL ETFs, revealing lowest fees in market
items.whyYouShouldCare: Morgan Stanley's low-fee ETH and SOL ETFs could enhance institutional interest in Solana, potentially increasing liquidity and market positioning.

items.title: Solana’s $1B USDC mint collides with DeFi app shutdown as users face unfinished Drift recovery
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $1B USDC mint amidst a DeFi app shutdown raises concerns about Solana's ecosystem stability and user confidence, impacting future liquidity.

items.title: Introducing Frontier Traders
items.whyYouShouldCare: The introduction of Frontier Traders could expand Solana's application landscape, attracting new users and increasing overall ecosystem engagement.
